name: L-4 extract-patterns writes a JSON array of patterns to the --out file given a PR with review comments
command: printf '%s' '{"number":42,"comments":[{"body":"please add null check before dereferencing"}]}' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --out patterns.json 2>err.txt && node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("patterns.json","utf8"));process.exit(Array.isArray(a)&&a.length>=1?0:1)' && echo extracted 1>&2
